Hero.desc: We are a Mexican digital agency building professional websites, mobile apps, custom systems, WhatsApp bots and IT infrastructure for businesses worldwide. Enterprise-level quality at competitive Latin American rates.

WhyChooseUs.title: Why choose CA Digital
WhyChooseUs.subtitle: We are not just programmers. We are strategic partners who understand your business and create scalable solutions.

cards.title: Competitive Rates
cards.desc: Enterprise quality at 40-60% less than US or European agencies. Same technology stack, same standards, better price.

cards.title: English-Speaking Team
cards.desc: Full communication in English. No language barriers, no misunderstandings. We write docs, proposals and code comments in English.

cards.title: Remote-First, Worldwide
cards.desc: We have worked with clients from the US, Spain, Colombia, Argentina and beyond. Distance is not an obstacle.

cards.title: Real Accountability
cards.desc: We don't disappear after delivery. We offer maintenance, monitoring and continuous support.

cards.title: Modern Tech Stack
cards.desc: React, Next.js, Flutter, Node.js, Supabase, n8n, OpenAI API. Same tools used by top Silicon Valley startups.

cards.title: IT Infrastructure Experts
cards.desc: Beyond digital: networks, Fortinet firewalls, Windows Server, Synology NAS, CCTV and on-site support for Mexico and LATAM clients.
